arts.ttl: Marti Cifuentes sets QPR squad new challenge ahead of Hull City trip
arts.sum: Queens Park Rangers head coach Marti Cifuentes has called on his side to keep up their impressive upturn in form as they prepare for Tuesday night's long trip to Hull City . But Rangers' recovery has been impressive in the months since and Cifuentes wants more of the same under the MKM Stadium lights on Tuesday evening.

arts.ttl: Ruben Selles outlines what qualities new signing Kyle Joseph will bring to Hull City
arts.sum: Hull City will inherit a born winner in striker Kyle Joseph, according to Ruben Selles. He's a winner, a person who wants to do things properly every single time, and Kyle can be a very important addition to our team."

arts.ttl: Hull City seek to clear transfer hurdle in quest to sign international winger
arts.sum: Hull Live understands the Tigers have agreed a fee with the Terriers for the Welsh international, who is currently on loan in Ligue 1 with Nantes, but have hit a stumbling block with the French club who remain determined to keep him with him having a good relationship with boss Antoine Kombouaré. Hull City remain locked in talks to sign Huddersfield Town winger Sorba Thomas after boss Ruben Selles confirmed the club's interest in the 25-year-old.

arts.ttl: Brighton loanee Carl Rushworth opens up on his Hull City future after impressive league debut
arts.sum: Getting the clean sheets and the wins is always going to be a bonus for that, so I just made it clear that I just need to play. Goalkeeper Carl Rushworth admits his lengthy injury spell earlier this season took its toll on him, but says he's now determined to keep the number one jersey after making his long-awaited return to action.

arts.ttl: Hull City head coach speaks out on Eliot Matazo transfer deal and the need for more player exits
arts.sum: And Selles admits the 21-year-old is likely to garner interest, given his lack of playing time at City, having been a regular under the former manager. City made their fourth signing of a busy winter window so far when Kyle Joseph completed his £2.5m move from League One side Blackpool, and he will be followed by Fenerbahce attacker Lincoln Henrique, while the Tigers are hopeful of clinching a deal to sign Monaco's 22-year-old midfielder Eliot Matazo after he passed a medical on Monday and agreed terms on a long-term contract.
